mapper.sql: application_id, name, description, logo_url, applicant_id, status, apply_time, approve_time, approve_by, reject_reason
mapper.select: SELECT FROM community_create_applications WHERE applicant_id = #{applicantId} ORDER BY apply_time DESC
SELECT FROM community_create_applications WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY apply_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_create_applications WHERE name = #{name}
